description:
Goal:
Support brokers that require verification email through a controlled inbox path.

Scope:
- plus-addressing job correlation design
- IMAP polling fallback or webhook abstraction
- message parsing boundaries
- DKIM/SPF verification as design requirement or placeholder if not available in MVP

Acceptance:
- Email confirmation can be correlated to a job in tests.
- Forged/unmatched messages cannot close jobs.
- Personal inbox verification remains manual_required.
title: Add controlled email verification foundation
